purpose: Declare visual asset categories for future CC0 import validation without vendoring third-party binaries.

categories.name: characters
categories.intended_use: future player and NPC sprite or model samples

categories.name: enemies
categories.intended_use: future enemy sprite or model samples

categories.name: tiles_and_props
categories.intended_use: future map tiles, dungeon props, and town props

categories.name: ui_skin
categories.intended_use: future panels, buttons, icons, and HUD visuals

categories.name: battle_backgrounds
categories.intended_use: future static or layered battle backdrop samples

license_status: repository-owned placeholder metadata; no external asset imported
